from IL7 , what i will study Mardi ?

According to your schedule, on Mardi (Tuesday), you will have the following classes:

1. M236 Développement WEB JEE (CM) with Pr. SMIMITE in Salle 5 Gr 2.
2. M236 Développement WEB JEE (TD) with Pr. SMIMITE in Salle 5 Gr 2.
3. M236 Développement WEB JEE (TP) with Pr.KARBIL in Salle 8 (twice).
4. M235_1 TEC with Pr. LAHSAINI in Salle 8.
5. M232-1 Transformation Digitale (CM) with Pr. EL BICHRI in Amphi 3.
6. M237 Programmation Python (TP) with Pr. SAAD in Salle 5 Gr 2 and Salle 5 Gr 1.
7. M234 POO en C with no specified professor or room.

Please note that the schedule seems to have some repetitions and unclear entries. If you could provide more context or clarify your schedule, I'd be happy to help you better.
